reviews.review_description: Simple but oh so fun! Feels like you are an alchemist!

Ok, agreed this is addictive. I need a few changes for it to get more stars. You get items added to your workshop as you level up but you won’t know this until you play ALOT but no where does it tell you what you can earn, when you earn or what you would like to add. I want a choice, a goal and more of a creative input to what my workshop looks like. It’s too random and mostly added items go unnoticed unless it’s a massive piece of furniture.  I think this game was launched and then left out there for hopes of mega downloads. It could be so much more, I want it to be more. It took me an unexpected amount of time to figure things out beyond the actual play time of sorting colors. I want rankings among players to see where you compare.  Bring in stats, mixed media update, building and furniture choices and views from the windows because being locked into a room with zero views is getting claustrophobic. I wonder if this is another thrown together app and abandoned. I guess I will revise this when I receive an updated version or reply from something other than a bot. This has the potential of being a HUGE sustainable app.

developer_response.body: I think there is some miss understanding. First I am not a bot :))) Human answers always. Second, it is an implementation of the color sort genre games in VR.  The gameplay curve is designed carefully and we added a secondary minigame as a goal, the recipes. The environment is fix, if we want to extend we have to decrease the visual quality or exclude the quest 2 users because of the graphics hardware limits.  Please read the in game help to see clearly what is this game. Our goal was creating a lightweight daily chill activity to the users with the possible maximum visual quality.

reviews.review_description:
... I just wish the developers would add the option of playing the game in mixed reality. 🤓

At some point, a co-op and/or competitive multi-player mode could add value. In co-op mode each player could have their own valves and there could also be a few slots/valves that both players can use. So they need to coordinate and cooperate to win.

In competitive mode, each player could get the same valves and whoever finishes theirs first, wins.

Magic Color Merge Puzzle is a creative and engaging puzzle game that takes a simple concept and pushes it to its full potential. The theme is charming—mixing potions, crafting, and experimenting keeps the gameplay fresh and rewarding.

The recent HD+ profile from QGO makes the game look even more stunning, adding extra polish to an already well-executed design.

With its unique twist on puzzle-solving, fun theme, and hours of replayability, Magic Color Merge Puzzle is a well-rounded experience.

I've played a lot of merge games. They can be quite addictive and rewarding as you are going through levels but doing it in VR adds a spin on it that is actually quite engaging. I jumped in for a quick 5 minute session and couldn't put it down till I done my first research. I am looking forward to seeing unlockables added to it. The part that clicked for me was when I got a mix wrong, I would pick up the glass to throw it to restart and it helps take the frustration out. It's a nice reward loop. I could just imagine a goblin standing on the shelves criticise you while a wizard teacher praises you. And when you throw the vial at the creature it reacts. It would add a nice level of dynamics to it. It's always fun to throw stuff.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review, Daniel :) The talking mate is a good idea, we will research about... In our other game (Hexagon Ultra), we have talking opponents ;) 
I tell you a secret: the throwing mechanism will have another role in the later updates..  It is on the development roadmap.

reviews.review_description: Hey guys this is great relaxing fun game and has a Harry Potter wizard type part 2 added mixing fluids which makes it even mor interesting , and devs fixed a problem I had n the 1st review and now really wanna knw what’s next like what the plans r w the crafting solutions caus can’t wait and hopeing maybe mor levels added and start using liquids experimenting w solutions that u r crafting? Can’t wait to c what’s next ty again devs for such a cool fun and relaxing game and ty for response and the hot fix so quickly!!!🤩

A very well designed VR rewrite of similar puzzle games. Well done medieval design, enhanced by the VR experience. It really turns you off, you don't even notice it and you're already on the 40th level. Cleverly spiced up with a bit of crafting, resource gathering and the variety of daily challenges adds to the the enjoyment. The developer is very helpful if you have any questions or problems.

This is one of those games where time just flies by you don’t even notice it, because it completely pulls you in and keeps you there. ;)

The visuals are high-quality and beautifully crafted. It’s easy to pick up, simple yet brilliant!

The difficulty levels are well-balanced, and it’s nearly impossible to stop playing-you just keep saying, "I'll just finish this one last part..."

The daily missions and custom game modes are excellent additions!

Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys giving their brain a workout! ;)

Just stopped to play after 2 hours, cuz need to charge up my headset.. Very impressed how this classic genre implemented in VR. Levels are challenging,  cusom "sandbox" like playground etc. Devs focused on details. I am curious where the crafting part is going, but it looks a good gamification stuff.
Typical sorting puzzle but in VR where you can actually pick up the bottles. Crafting and research gives you a little extra incentive to keep playing when you thought you had enough.

Just bought this in the hope that 2 of us could play it using different profiles, disappointingly it doesn't have that feature.
However, the game itself seems good enough though which is the main thing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 
The app doesn't restrict the family sharing. Normally if you buying one app, it doesn't appear in the another profile on a same headset,  you have to setup the sharing on the meta account. But in this case only one family member could play with the game in same time. I hope you will have a good time with our game !

reviews.review_description:
I like those kind of games.
Merge the same colored liquids togheter. 
First levels are easy, but it does not stay like that.
It isn’t that easy than you think.
Daily challenges to get gold, so you can buy diamonds.
I really like this game. The graphics are nice. It's relaxing. You can definitely get lost playing it. Highly recommend if looking for a relaxing different kind of game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Kimberly!  This is exactly our mission!

reviews.review_description: I love this type of game on mobile, so I started this one with curiosity... and wow  it’s basically a stress relief pill wrapped in pure satisfaction! Everything just clicks. Not many VR games have hit me like this before. I really hope there are tons of levels, because this is about to become part of my daily self-care routine. Thanks for the virtual therapy!
